final_answer:
Implemented the core validator-add code cutover now, but full BSC-parity end-to-end is still not complete yet.

Why this matters: validator admission now applies state in `ValidatorJoin` only after finalized main-chain receipt/event validation, so valid joins are no longer dependent on side-tx post-handler execution.

What I changed:
1. Added shared finalized-event validation for validator join in [validator_join_validation.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/x/stake/keeper/validator_join_validation.go).
2. Moved actual validator creation + sequence persistence into `ValidatorJoin` in [msg_server.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/x/stake/keeper/msg_server.go).
3. Reused that shared validation in side handler and made join post-handler replay idempotent in [side_msg_server.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/x/stake/keeper/side_msg_server.go).
4. Updated join test expectations in [msg_server_test.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-consensus/x/stake/keeper/msg_server_test.go).

Checks run:
1. `go test ./x/stake/keeper -run '^$'` passed.
2. `go test ./x/stake/types -run '^$'` passed.
3. `go test ./bridge/processor -run '^$'` passed.
4. `go test ./app -run '^$'` passed.
5. `go test ./x/stake/...` failed with test setup panic: `reflect: New(nil)` in `types/msgservice.RegisterMsgServiceDesc` via `x/stake/types/codec.go` before suite logic executes.

Current blocker: full `x/stake` test suite is blocked by that registration panic path.

Next steps:
1. Fix the `RegisterInterfaces`/msg-service registration panic path in `x/stake/types`.
2. Re-run full `go test ./x/stake/...`.
3. Continue remaining BSC-parity items (native self-signed validator admission path and bridge-broadcaster join removal) after tests are green.
